kyutai-mcp

Scope: FastMCP 3.1+ server + SOTA web dashboard for Kyutai Moshi (speech-to-speech dialogue).

Entry points:
- README.md
- llms-full.txt (full tool + ops documentation)

Key URLs:
- Upstream Moshi repo: https://github.com/kyutai-labs/moshi
- Moshi FAQ: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kyutai-labs/moshi/main/FAQ.md
